Shield of the Red Dragon  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 25
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 CHA: +10 AGI: -5
SV FIRE: +40 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +5 SV MAGIC: +5 SV POISON: +5
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD DRU BRD ROG SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

satnak battle shield
QuoteReply
# Apr 14 2004 at 2:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592262919084
22 posts
i will have a SBS over this anyday. this cost 4k more than a SBS which only cost 1k easy
▲ Page top
Shield
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2003 at 10:04 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591776410526
Sage
280 posts
I just traded my SCHW even for this shield, I think the price has come down alot on this or someone really wanted a haste item. 40 sv fire is sweet, but a SBS is a better shield overall for general use as its +10 sv cold and magic and has 40 hps to boot. Anyway with this Im close to 280 resist fire with my potions of cold ( +25 sv fire and +25 AGI ). If you need save fire gear Id reccomend a stone of morid ( 30svf/30svc ), firekeepers tunic ( 20 svf ) , Lodizal shield on back slot ( 10 svm, 20svc, 20svf ), enshrouded veil ( 10 svf ), opal stein ( 10 all saves ), and BD earrings and bracers ( 4/6/6/11/11 and 9/9/11/9/9 on each saves ) as some gear that is alot cheaper and has good saves.

58 Ogre Luminary on Luclin server--Chaotic Winds--Venerable Aggrok

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 21 2001 at 1:37 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Jeez guys you greedy cusses, I personally don't care who uses it or wears it, I'm actually pretty happy when my clerics live, means that the whole party has a better chance of serviveing and not the long body runs with coffins and the like. I would be happy if my clerics all had 200 wis, saves, and could be put outta harms way to keep me and my group alive. I get tired of seeing you guys whine and moan about this one has this this one has that, grow up. If your partners have the best they can have then there is a better chance you'll live and eventually get it for yourself. Why be so selfish?
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 23 2001 at 3:01 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Im not sure anyone else has noticed but, that is a CLERIC using that shield! How stupid is that?? i mean all the saves are nice for a cleric but come on! this is a tank shield....glad im not on that server in that stupid guild for giving such a great SK and pally shield to a cleric. flame me if you want...but thats just utterly stupid
#Anonymous, Posted: May 22 2001 at 6:22 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I kinda agree, it has been my experience that if a cleric can use an item, they get it, (except for haste items lol) regardless of whether another class would make better use of it.
RE: common sense
QuoteReply
# May 29 2001 at 7:54 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
well - certainly wouldnt agree with ya. On Naggy raids or raids on mobs with same lewt table, most casters get screwed outa things " because it is a melee " item this and that. Actually, I am getting pretty tired of people making those assumptions. Quit day dreaming, it doesnt bring you close to the item you desire =) and quite frankly, I do believe that since they participated on the raid, they should be able to roll on ANY item their class was considered for, period.

QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2001 at 11:41 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591770741070
59 posts
Any rogue that would *ever* use a shield is a complete moron. Same with warriors. Only people who should even concern themselves with this shield is druids, pallys, SKs, clerics, and shamen.
▲ Page top
RE: Rogues?
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2002 at 8:03 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592791883973
33 posts
My warrior uses a shield, and isn't a moron.

As a small race, my warrior swiches to a shield to bash and interupt spell-casing NPCs, then switches back to her off-hand weapon. Comes in handy.

On raids, she'll sacrafice AC gear for resist gear, and that often means wielding a shield. While that lowers her damage output, the net result is less of a need for heals, so the healers on the raid can concentrate on the main assist.

Ever pull a mob who likes to snare/root? While I much prefer pullin' with my SK, more often then not my Warrior spends time pulling in groups. After tagging the caster-mob with an arrow, switching to a shield to help mitigate spell damage results in making it back to the party in one piece.

By the time someone is able to get this shield, they'll know whether or not it would benefit their toon. While everyone has a right to his or her own opinion, calling someone a moron for doing things differently than you would isn't called for.

Ultimately, it's a game. Use a shield, don't use a shield, wear cloth armor in the arena in Kael--whatever it takes to keep this game fun for you.
▲ Page top
RE: Rogues?
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2003 at 9:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785091039
3 posts
Cloth armor in Kael? My warrior wears a cloth robe as MA in ToV, it's dyed to almost black, just because he looks cool doing it. Not like those mobs are worth worrying about anymore. It's always fun to stand there and get a ss in a 2 ac cloth robe tanking one of the nameds in ToV. Whatever makes it fun!!!!

Odiosa 65 Archon
